description: drag_accel uses -(k/m)*abs(v)*v so drag always points against the velocity and grows with v squared
Recomputes the acceleration from the current speed every step (it is no longer constant)
Uses |v| = sqrt(vx^2+vy^2) and slows both vx and vy; gravity only on vy
Terminal velocity matches sqrt(m*g/k) and the drag range lands close to the simulated value
